jobs.title: Director, ICT Job JKUATES
responsibilities: Formulating, implementing and reviewing ICT policies, standards, strategies and procedures for effective deployment and management of technology resources.

Leading adoption of innovative ICT solutions including cloud computing, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and business process re-engineering to enhance service delivery and address global trends.
Overseeing business transformation office, enterprise architecture, solutions design, and selecting business application systems.

Coordinating development, deployment and maintenance of core banking systems, ERP, Enterprise Data Warehouse, Business Intelligence applications, and systems for institutions in receivership/liquidation.
Overseeing ICT infrastructure deployment, information security management system (ISMS) based on ISO standards, and ensuring compliance with ISO 9001:2015 and 27001:2022 standards.
Implementing and maintaining backup systems, disaster recovery sites, and business continuity planning to ensure data confidentiality, integrity and availability.
requirements: Cumulative period of fifteen (15) years’ relevant work experience five (5) of which should have been in the grade of Assistant Director and above, ICT or in a comparable position.

Bachelor’s Degree in any of the following fields: – Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Communication Technology, Business Information Technology or equivalent qualification from a recognized and accredited institution.

Master’s degree in any of the following disciplines: – Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Communication Technology, Business Information Technology, Computer Information Systems or equivalent qualification from a recognized and accredited institution.

Professional Certifications from a recognized institution such as Cisco Certified Network Professional (CCNP) or Microsoft Certified Systems Engineer (MCSE), Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA), Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP), Certified Business Analyst (CBAP), Microsoft Certified Solution Developer (MSSD) or any other relevant and recognized certification.

Certificate in Database Management (Oracle, SQL, DB2 or its equivalent), Information Security (CISSP, Security+, CISA, CISM or its equivalent), Service Support Operations (ITIL, COBIT or its equivalent), Network Administration (CCNA, HCNA, N+, HP or its equivalent), System Administration (MCSE, Linux, Unix or its equivalent), or Software Development (Java, Visual Studio, Python, Oracle, or its equivalent) or relevant certification from an accredited examination body.

jobs.title: Assistant Director – ICT (Business Applications) Job JKUATES
responsibilities: Developing and recommending for implementation policies, standards, strategies, guidelines and procedures for deployment, management and utilization of ICT business applications and resources for efficiency and effectiveness.

Participating in the adoption and implementation of effective strategies for the selection and deployment of ICT applications, software, service delivery, business process continuity/disaster recovery and information security.
Overseeing supervision, coaching, mentoring, training and development of the department staff to ensure a coherent and motivated team.
Developing strategies for conservation, harnessing and dissemination of knowledge and information as well as management of the Corporation’s Intranet and web portals.
Implementing and maintaining of back-up and disaster recovery sites to safeguard data to ensure confidentiality, availability and integrity of data within the Corporation.

Developing, reviewing and implementing business requirements to inform deployment and rollout of ICT systems, Enterprise Resource Management Planning System, the Enterprise Data Warehouse & Business intelligence, and other business relevant applications.
requirements: Cumulative period of twelve (12) years relevant work experience, three (3) of which must have been in the grade of Principal ICT Officer or in an equivalent or comparable position.

Bachelor’s Degree in any of the following fields: – Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Communication Technology, Business Information Technology or equivalent qualification from a recognized and accredited institution.

Master’s degree in any of the following disciplines: – Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Communication Technology, Business Information Technology, Computer Information Systems or equivalent qualification from a recognized and accredited institution.

Professional Certifications from a recognized institution such as Cisco Certified Network Professional (CCNP) or Microsoft Certified Systems Engineer (MCSE), Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA), Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP), Certified Business Analyst (CBAP), Microsoft Certified.
Solution Developer (MSSD) or any other relevant and recognized certification.

responsibilities: Strategic planning for the School.

Supervised at least two (2) postgraduate students to completion;

jobs.description: The Sales Data Analyst is responsible for collecting, analyzing, and interpreting sales and business data to support strategic decision-making and drive commercial performance. The role focuses on transforming raw data into meaningful insights through reporting, dashboards, and trend analysis to enhance sales effectiveness, operational efficiency, and business growth.
responsibilities: Collect, clean, and analyze structured and unstructured data from multiple sources to support business operations and sales performance tracking.
Generate accurate reports, dashboards, and visualizations using tools such as Advanced Excel, Power BI, and Tableau to support business intelligence needs.
Identify trends, patterns, and correlations in sales and operational data, and provide actionable insights and recommendations to support data-driven decision-making.
Utilize Advanced Excel techniques, including PivotTables, Power Query, complex formulas, and macros, for data analysis, reporting, and process improvement.
Write and optimize SQL queries to retrieve, manipulate, and validate data efficiently.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Sales, Finance, Production, and Management to understand business requirements and deliver tailored analytical solutions.
requirements: Education: Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Business Analytics, Information Technology, Computer Science, Economics, or a related field.
Experience: At least 3-5 years’ experience in data analysis, sales analytics, business intelligence, or a related analytical role.
